---
title: "The usage of AI"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---
# Ai Acknowledgement
AI tools were used to assist with coding, visualisation, and minor language improvements in this assignment.

1. Assisted with R coding (e.g., data cleaning, and plotting)
2. Supported ggplot visualisation (e.g., colours, scaling, regression plots)
3. Helped interpret and describe figures (e.g., boxplots, regression)
4. Assisted with Quarto formatting (e.g., inserting images, rendering PDF)
5. Corrected the English

# Ai Screenshot

![R code for transfering to date](images/date_ai.png)

![R code for group colors in plot](images/group_color.png)

![Types of ggplot](images/plot.png)

![Types of ggplot](images/plot2.png)

![Types of ggplot](images/plot3.png)

![R code for save decimal place](images/decimal_place.png)

![R code for zoom y-axis](images/zoom.png)

![R code for insert picture](images/insert.png)

![help to describe boxplot](images/boxplot_describe.png)

![R code for plot linear regression](images/linear_regression_plot.png)

![help to render to pdf](images/render_pdf.png)

![help to check the English](images/English.png)
